message:
fix: Android TV D-pad navigation and focus management

- AndroidManifest: Add leanback feature, touchscreen optional,
  LEANBACK_LAUNCHER category, and banner for TV launcher
- Create platform_info.dart for TV vs phone/desktop detection
- Wire TvShell into app via ShellRoute (sidebar nav with GoRouter)
- Rewrite TvShell nav buttons with proper Focus widgets, D-pad
  Enter/Select handling, and visible focus rings
- Replace provider bottom sheet with full-screen page (D-pad friendly)
- Add FocusTraversalGroup to provider forms and settings screen
- Add autofocus on first interactive element in all screens
- Replace FAB with inline 'Add Provider' button (reachable via D-pad)
- Add focused-state borders on FilledButton, TextButton, IconButton,
  SwitchListTile via theme
- Add keyboard/D-pad handler to guide screen (left/right scrolls timeline)
- Add 'Add Provider' button to channels empty state
- All changes preserve existing mobile/desktop behavior

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1,8 +1,14 @@
 <manifest xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android">
+    <!-- Android TV: touchscreen is optional (TV has no touchscreen) -->
+    <uses-feature android:name="android.hardware.touchscreen" android:required="false"/>
+    <!-- Android TV: declare Leanback support (required="false" so phone/tablet still works) -->
+    <uses-feature android:name="android.software.leanback" android:required="false"/>
+
     <application
         android:label="clubtivi"
         android:name="${applicationName}"
-        android:icon="@mipmap/ic_launcher">
+        android:icon="@mipmap/ic_launcher"
+        android:banner="@mipmap/ic_launcher">
         <activity
             android:name=".MainActivity"
             android:exported="true"
@@ -23,6 +29,8 @@
             <intent-filter>
                 <action android:name="android.intent.action.MAIN"/>
                 <category android:name="android.intent.category.LAUNCHER"/>
+                <!-- Android TV: show in TV launcher -->
+                <category android:name="android.intent.category.LEANBACK_LAUNCHER"/>
             </intent-filter>
         </activity>
         <!-- Don't delete the meta-data below.
